expectations.text: AI does NOT immediately start proposing a full project management tool
expectations.evidence: Baseline immediately listed 6 MVP features: 'Project dashboard with status, owners, deadlines... Team timeline or roadmap view... Notifications or reminders' — proposed a mini-Jira before asking a single question.

expectations.text: AI asks what's going wrong today (5 Whys approach)
expectations.evidence: Baseline asked 'what is currently breaking down most often' only as a trailing question AFTER already proposing the feature list, not as a discovery-first probing question.

expectations.text: AI helps user identify a minimal first iteration
expectations.evidence: Baseline suggested 'a 4-phase build plan' covering project dashboards, task tracking, roadmap views, notifications, and reporting — no scope reduction to a single focused first iteration.

expectations.text: Generated prompt is scoped to the specific minimal feature agreed upon
expectations.evidence: No structured handoff prompt generated. No interview took place to establish what minimal feature to scope to.
